name: agtx
description: Manage and decompose work into feature-level tasks on the agtx kanban board

interface.longDescription: agtx is a terminal kanban board for managing parallel coding agent sessions. Each task gets its own git worktree, branch, tmux window, and agent session — producing one reviewable PR per task.
defaultPrompt: Use @agtx:brainstorm to explore a feature idea
Use @agtx:sweep to push this conversation to the agtx board as tasks
